comment: card-only int8 round-trip; essentially free (imm +0.000002). card 4.25->1.06 KiB.
card-only int4; card 0.53 KiB = UNDER the 1 KB target. The headline state win on its own.
card-only int2 (ternary); 0.27 KiB but burns 83pct of the 0.0015 budget. int4 stays the card sweet spot; int2 is a QAT/extreme-memory candidate.
card+note both int8; note 12.75->3.19 KiB (note is 71pct of worst-user deploy memory). Nearly free.

RECOMMENDED DEPLOY. card 0.53 + note 3.19 KiB; worst user 9528 16.7 GB -> 3.6 GB. Quant aggressiveness proportional to 1/recurrence-length: card(short) int4, note(medium) int8, deck/preset/user(long) fp32.
card int2 + note int8; passes but card int2 dominates the cost. Extreme-memory / QAT candidate.
note int4 REJECTED: passes the iter0 floor but burns >2x the 0.0015 budget (note recurrence too long for int4). Shrink note via int8, not int4. QAT may unlock this later.
